cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. The key here is to look at the timeline of her day and see when she wasn't accounted for. So, first, Jennifer woke up at 5am. Then, Richard saw her at the office from 5am to 8am. That means she was busy in the office during those three hours. So between 5 and 8 am, she wasn't free. Then, after that, what happened? The next thing is Samantha saw her at the library reading from 12pm to 1pm. So between 12pm and 1pm, she was at the library. Before that, what's the time gap? Well, from 8am to 12pm. Let me check if there's anything else. Then Betty saw her at the bike shop from 1pm to 2pm. So between 1 and 2 pm, she was at the bike shop. Then Sarah saw her at the electronics store from 2pm to 9pm buying a phone. That's a long time, from 2 pm to 9 pm. So she was at the electronics store for seven hours. After that, Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. And the swimming pool was closed after 10 pm. So the question is, when could Jennifer have gone to the swimming pool? First, we need to figure out the time slots where she wasn't doing other things. Let's map her schedule: - 5am - 8am: Office (Richard) - 8am - 12pm: Unknown - 12pm - 1pm: Library (Samantha) - 1pm - 2pm: Bike shop (Betty) - 2pm - 9pm: Electronics store (Sarah) - 9pm - 10pm: Statue of Liberty (Thomas) So the only time slot when Jennifer wasn't accounted for is between 8am and 12pm. Because from 5 am to 8 am, she was at the office. Then after that, from 12 pm onwards, she's seen at the library, bike shop, electronics store, etc. So the only free time is 8 am to 12 pm. Also, the pool is closed after 10 pm, but that doesn't affect the possible times unless the pool is closed during other hours as well. We don't have information about when the pool opens, but since the pool is open until 10pm, and Jennifer's last activity is at 9pm to 10pm at the Statue of Liberty, but she couldn't go to the pool after 10 pm. So the possible time for the pool is between 8 am and 12 pm. Let's check the options: (A) 8am to 12pm (B) 9pm to 10pm (C) 2pm to 9pm (D) 12pm to 1pm Option A is the one where she is not accounted for. But let me double-check. She was at the library from 12pm to 1pm, so 12pm to 1pm is when she was reading, so she couldn't go to the pool then. Option D is when she was at the library.
